message:
chore: update scratch test harnesses and sync beads issue tracker

test_is_cmd.rs: Replaced is_command_candidate test with a direct regex
debug harness for the VAR_ASSIGN pattern. Used to verify the semicolon
boundary fix (FOO=bar;rm -rf /) — shows match extent and remaining
text after variable assignment consumption.

test_safe.rs: New scratch harness for evaluate_stateless() testing
destructive command sequences ('rm -rf target; rm -rf /') through
the full CommandGuard pipeline.

.beads/issues.jsonl: Sync local issue tracker state reflecting new
mission Tx, replay performance, and agent suitability beads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
